result.stderr:
Yaat - Yet another APIM tool 1.1.0+35a184fd88038503826c7d453e5209ab349c77e3
Copyright (C) 2026 Massimiliano Donini

  --api-name       Required. The name of the api in the API Management service.

  --svc            Required. The url of the downstream service that will be
                   exposed via the API.

  --spec-url       Required. The url of the downstream service specification
                   e.g. the swagger file.

  --spec-format    Required. The type of the specification, possible values are
                   (openapi, openapi+json, openapi+json-link, openapi-link,
                   swagger-json, swagger-link-json, wadl-link-json, wadl-xml,
                   wsdl and wsdl-link).

  --apim-name      The name of the API Management service, if not provided it
                   will pick the only one present in the selected subscription,
                   or throw if more than one are found.

  --sub-id         The id of the subscription, if not provided it will use the
                   default subscription of the logged in session.

  --sub-name       The Name of the subscription, used to find the most suitable
                   subscription if more than one are found. This has no effect
                   is sub-id is specified.

  --retry          The number of times to retry, max allowed value is 10.

  --debug          Enables detailed logging.

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.

  --api-name       Required. The name of the api in the API Management service.

staticCommands.name: update
staticCommands.description: Updates the api of an API Management service

options.description: The name of the api in the API Management service.
The type of the specification, possible values are (openapi, openapi+json, openapi+json-link, openapi-link, swagger-json, swagger-link-json, wadl-link-json, wadl-xml, wsdl and wsdl-link).
The url of the downstream service specification e.g. the swagger file.
The url of the downstream service that will be exposed via the API.
The name of the API Management service, if not provided it will pick the only one present in the selected subscription, or throw if more than one are found.
The number of times to retry, max allowed value is 10.
The id of the subscription, if not provided it will use the default subscription of the logged in session.
The Name of the subscription, used to find the most suitable subscription if more than one are found. This has no effect is sub-id is specified.
